methods.name: eth_streams.pipeline.pipeline.Pipeline.backfill
documentation:
Backfills using Extractor(s), then iterates all events in the extractor using the Transformer.
This allows an extractor to require processing of events from the previous step.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.__contains__
documentation: Return True if the dict has a key, else return False.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.__getitem__
documentation:
Return the item of the dict.

Raises a KeyError if key is not in the map.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.__setitem__
documentation: Set d[key] to value.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.pop
documentation:
Get item from the dict and remove it.

Return default if expired or does not exist. Never raise KeyError.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.ttl
documentation:
Return TTL of the `key` (in seconds).

Returns None for non-existent or expired keys.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.get
documentation: Return the value for key if key is in the dictionary, else default.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.items
documentation: Return a copy of the dictionary's list of (key, value) pairs.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.items_with_timestamp
documentation: Return a copy of the dictionary's list of (key, value, timestamp) triples.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.values
documentation:
Return a copy of the dictionary's list of values.
See the note for dict.items().

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.fromkeys
documentation: Create a new dictionary with keys from seq and values set to value.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.iteritems
documentation: Return an iterator over the dictionary's (key, value) pairs.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.itervalues
documentation: Return an iterator over the dictionary's values.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.viewitems
documentation: Return a new view of the dictionary's items ((key, value) pairs).

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.viewkeys
documentation: Return a new view of the dictionary's keys.

methods.name: eth_streams.utils.expiring_dict.ExpiringDict.viewvalues
documentation: Return a new view of the dictionary's values.
